governing_rule: Search can inform every agent. Search cannot authorize action by itself.

evidence_tiers.label: internal_and_direct
evidence_tiers.confidence_posture: high for internal direction; public use still gated

evidence_tiers.label: standards_governance_security_research
evidence_tiers.confidence_posture: medium to high after applicability review

evidence_tiers.label: loose_discovery
evidence_tiers.confidence_posture: low; inspiration and source discovery only

primary_sources.evidence_limit: does not prove Toni's offer, ROI, client demand, or public outcomes

unsourced social claims as action evidence

allowed_web_sources: repo source, tests, contracts, manifests, and local instructions
official cloud architecture docs when the cloud path is in scope
official database, hosting, API, auth, payment, and security docs when platform behavior matters
standards and governance bodies for risk and control lenses
broad search for source discovery and pattern sensing only
blocked_sources: AI-generated architecture summaries without source trail
private client systems not opened by Toni
broad web claims used to justify platform adoption
promotion_required_for: cloud, DNS, billing, deploy, database, or secret mutation
packs.next_review_trigger: first real architecture review that changes runtime, schema, cross-repo boundary, hosted DTP plan, or implementation handoff
